pr.title: docs: ICP bracket-mix concept doc + calibration plan + branch-hygiene compound learning + assets
pr.body:
## Summary

Pushes the Replit-Agent docs/assets work accumulated on local main. **Pure docs/assets — no code, no engine surface, no migrations.**

Includes:
- **`docs/concepts/bracket-mix.md`** (+375, new) — canonical bracket-mix definition doc that the Phase C work (PR #138) and future U5 substrate reference.
- **`docs/plans/2026-05-13-001-feat-seed-calibration-bracket-defaults-and-irr-views-plan.md`** (+260, new) — the seed-calibration / bracket-defaults / IRR-views plan that motivates the U5 feature (held back for PR B). Incremental edits captured across commits — portfolio analysis target, IRR view consolidation, pure-IRR clarification, canonical data flow, layered defaults.
- **`docs/solutions/conventions/cc-replit-branch-hygiene-2026-05-10.md`** (+113/-1) — compound learning from today's Replit-Agent-stranded-on-sandbox incident. Updates the existing branch-hygiene runbook with the worktree-isolation-at-`/tmp/hp-*` pattern that shipped PRs #133–#137, #140, #141.
- **3 image assets** under `attached_assets/` — visual references for the docs above.

## Why now

These commits accumulated on local main while the Replit-Agent was driving in the workspace and never got pushed. They're docs/assets only and unblock the upcoming PR B (U5 substrate for refi-LTV cap + exit cap defaults), which references `docs/concepts/bracket-mix.md` and the calibration plan.

## What's NOT in this PR (intentional)

- The handoff doc commit (`eb06821ee`) — same file is already in PR #138, skipped to avoid a merge conflict.
- A stray `attached_assets/*.txt` self-note from the Replit-Agent — not worth carrying forward.
- The U5 feature commit `9209d84ea` — goes in PR B with migration-slot renumbering.
- The ambient `.claude/scheduled_tasks.lock` session-state update — restored to `origin/main` value so the diff is docs/assets only.

## Test plan

- [x] No code changes; typecheck + tests are unaffected.
- [x] Diff verified docs/assets only (6 files, +748/-1).
- [ ] CI runs cleanly (docs-only).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

  * Added canonical specification for ICP Bracket Mix, defining structure, storage rules, authoring sources, and integration boundaries.
  * Added documentation plan for seed calibration and bracket-default extension with implementation roadmap.
  * Enhanced Replit branch hygiene troubleshooting guide with additional diagnostic indicators and recovery procedures.
